API & Authentication\\n- **Base URL:** `https://api.app.mrscraper.com`\\n- **Authentication:** Uses an API token passed in the header as `x-api-token` or as a query parameter `apiTokenName` for analytics.\\n- **API Reference:** [https://docs.mrscraper.com/api-reference/overview](https://docs.mrscraper.com/api-reference/overview)\\n- **Authentication Docs:** [https://docs.mrscraper.com/api-reference/authentication](https://docs.mrscraper.com/api-reference/authentication)\\n\\n### 2. Pricing & Access\\nMrScraper uses a 'Token Plan' where tokens are consumed based on runtime and AI processing (input/output tokens).\\n- **Free:** 100 tokens, 10 concurrency.\\n- **Standard:** 150k tokens, 50 concurrency ($24/mo).\\n- **Pro:** 1M tokens, 100 concurrency ($79/mo).\\n- **Enterprise:** Custom tokens and concurrency.\\n- **Pricing Page:** [https://mrscraper.com/pricing](https://mrscraper.com/pricing)\\n- **Token Plan Docs:** [https://docs.mrscraper.com/billing/token-plan](https://docs.mrscraper.com/billing/token-plan)\\n\\n### 3. raw_result.description: AI-powered web scraping platform with a token-based API and hosted MCP server for structured data extraction.
raw_result.auth_notes: REST API docs specify API token authentication via the `x-api-token` header; docs also mention `apiTokenName` as a query parameter for analytics/tracking. MCP server docs specify Bearer token authentication.
raw_result.gating_reason: Public docs describe a free tier with 100 tokens and 10 concurrency, alongside self-serve paid plans.

api_surface.breadth: Public documentation shows a REST API with overview and authentication pages, plus product/docs sections for activating the API, billing, and usage guidance. A hosted MCP server is also documented, but broad endpoint coverage was not fully verified from the gathered evidence.
api_surface.mcp_notes: Official docs describe an MCP server at https://mcp.mrscraper.com/mcp using Bearer token authentication.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: No explicit per-minute/request rate limits were verified. Docs evidence indicates plan-based concurrency limits instead: Free 10, Standard 50, Pro 100; troubleshooting guidance suggests reducing concurrent requests when limits are hit.
raw_result.notable_signals: Official docs provide public API auth documentation, a public pricing page with free and paid tiers, and first-party MCP server documentation. No official GitHub repository was verified from the gathered evidence.
raw_result.human_review_reason: Some fields remain partially ambiguous from the gathered evidence: endpoint breadth beyond overview/auth pages was not exhaustively verified; exact paid pricing figures appeared inconsistent across gathered outputs; and no official GitHub/MCP registry listing was directly verified, only first-party MCP docs.
